summary: Iteration 18 - Comprehensive testing of profile features, spelling fixes, proof screenshot upload, and admin create student form. All 23 backend tests passed. All UI tests passed. Fixed one spelling issue in StudentDashboard.js.

spelling_counselor.details: Counselor Dashboard header shows 'Counselor' (American spelling). Fixed one instance in StudentDashboard.js

proof_screenshot_upload.details: Teacher proof dialog has screenshot upload field with data-testid='proof-screenshot-upload'. Shows 'Screenshot (required)' label

teacher_profile_get.details: GET /api/teacher/profile returns full profile data including teacher_code, star_rating, bio, etc.

teacher_profile_update.details: POST /api/teacher/update-full-profile updates bio, age, education, interests successfully

teacher_bank_lock.details: Bank details show 'Locked' badge after first entry. Message: 'Bank details are locked after first entry. Contact admin to update.'

teacher_view_profile_non_admin.details: GET /api/teacher/view-profile/{id} hides bank details for non-admin users

teacher_view_profile_admin.details: GET /api/teacher/view-profile/{id} shows bank details for admin users

counselor_profile_get.details: GET /api/counsellor/profile returns full profile with counselor_id (KLC-XXXXXX format)

admin_bank_override.details: POST /api/admin/update-bank-details/{user_id} can override locked bank details

admin_create_student_no_preferred_time.details: Admin create student form has no preferred time fields. Fields: Name, Email, Password, Phone, Grade/Class, Institute, State, City, Country, Goal

error_handling.details: API errors return proper error messages, not 'JSON response error'

teacher_dashboard_my_profile.details: Teacher dashboard has 'My Profile' button with data-testid='my-profile-button'

counselor_dashboard_my_profile.details: Counselor dashboard has 'My Profile' button with data-testid='my-profile-link'

teacher_profile_page.details: Teacher profile page loads at /teacher-profile with KLAT Score, Personal Information, Bank Details (with lock), Resume sections

counselor_profile_page.details: Counselor profile page loads at /counselor-profile with KL-CAT Score, Personal Information, Bank Details, Resume sections

seed_data_creation: Created test teacher for bank lock testing (TEST_BankTest_Teacher_*), cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All profile features working. Teacher profile shows KLAT Score, bank details with lock indicator. Counselor profile shows KL-CAT Score. Admin can override locked bank details. Proof screenshot upload working. No preferred time fields in admin create student form. Spelling fixed to 'Counselor' throughout.
